ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol used to identify the instrument in financial markets */,
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument type */,
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market segment the instrument belongs to */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* The company or entity that issued the instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* The date when the instrument matures (relevant for bonds and other fixed-income instruments) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_instrument_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type_id") REFERENCES instrument_types ("instrument_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("market_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument at the given date and time */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument at the given date and time */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument at the given date and time */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument at the given date and time */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares or contracts traded at the given date and time */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Closing price adjusted for corporate actions */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., stock exchange, financial institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "trading_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "volume_traded" INTEGER /* Volume traded at the given date and time */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed at the given date and time */,
  "average_trade_size" REAL /* Average size of trades executed at the given date and time */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trading volume data (e.g., stock exchange, financial institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Moving average of the instrument at the given date and time */,
  "relative_strength_index" REAL /* Relative strength index of the instrument at the given date and time */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the instrument's price over a period */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the instrument, indicating its sensitivity to market movements */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the instrument (relevant for stocks) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the instrument (relevant for stocks) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., internal calculation, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., trading, research) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID associated with the access event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "market_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "market_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  "index_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the index representing the market segment (e.g., S&P 500 for equity) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the market segment information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "instrument_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the instrument type */,
  "return_expectation" TEXT /* Expected return for the instrument type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the instrument type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_type_id")
)
